title: Senior Revenue Manager at Taj Hotels

jsonLd.title: Senior Revenue Manager at Taj Hotels
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Taj Hotels! We are hiring a Revenue Manager for our Agra team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Taj Hotels:
Taj Hotels is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in Barista Skills

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Taj Hotels!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
